creator: val@packett.cool
text:
Created attachment 229153
0001-devel-libtool-optionalize-INFO.patch

makeinfo can be an annoying/unwanted build dependency. info pages aren't popular in the BSD world anyway. Maybe let's make them optional here, and disable by default even, like in this patch?

---

In this port, the tarballs already contain .info files, so we don't have to patch out their installation, we can just avoid rebuilding them \o/
